SEARCH
Package user

Class Manager

java.lang.Object
user.User
user.Manager
public class Manager extends User
It implements the manager of the store
Version:
1.4
Author:
Sofía C.L.
See Also:
  • User

      public static Manager getInstance()
      Obtains the maneger's instance

      the manager of the store

      Searches for the store products based on the filters
      Returns:
      the products the list of products found

    • searchStoreProductCategory

      public List<StoreProduct> searchStoreProductCategory(Category... categories)
      Searches for the store products based on the filters and categories
      Parameters:
      categories - the categories to filter by
      Returns:
      the products the list of products found

    • addFigurine

      public boolean addFigurine(double price, String name, String description, String photo, int stock, String dimensions, String brand, String material, Category... categories)
      Adds and creates new figurine
      Parameters:
      price - the price of the figurine
      name - the name of the figurine
      description - the description of the figurine
      photo - the photo of the figurine
      stock - the figurine's stock
      dimensions - the figurine's dimensions
      brand - the figurine's brand
      material - the figurine's material
      categories - the figurine's categories
      Returns:
      true if the figurine was added, false if else

    • addProductFromFile

      public boolean addProductFromFile(String filename)
      Adds and creates new products from a file
      Parameters:
      filename - the name of the file
      Returns:
      true if the product's were added successfully, false if else

    • addGame

      public boolean addGame(double price, String name, String description, String photo, int stock, int numPlayers, String ageRange, GameStyle gameStyle, Category... categories)
      Adds and creates new game
      Parameters:
      price - the price of the game
      name - the name of the game
      description - the description of the game
      photo - the photo of the comic
      stock - the game's stock
      numPlayers - the game's number of players
      ageRange - the game's age range
      gameStyle - the style of the game
      categories - the game's categories
      Returns:
      true if the game was added, false if else

    • addComic

      public boolean addComic(double price, String name, String description, String photo, int stock, int numPages, Year year, String author, String editorial, Category... categories)
      Adds and creates new comic
      Parameters:
      price - the price of the comic
      name - the name of the comic
      description - the description of the comic
      photo - the photo of the comic
      stock - the comic's stock
      numPages - the comic's number of pages
      year - the year of publication
      author - the comic's author
      editorial - the comic's editorial
      categories - the comic's categories
      Returns:
      true if the comic was added, false if else

      permission - , the permission it has

    • createFixedPercentageDiscount

      public FixedPercentageDiscount createFixedPercentageDiscount(LocalDateTime startDate, LocalDateTime endDate, double percentage, Category... categories)
      The fixed percentage discount's constructor with default id whose coverage is Category
      Parameters:
      startDate - the discount's start date
      endDate - the discount's end date
      percentage - the discount's percentage
      categories - the desired categories
      Returns:
      the new CategoryFixedPercentage discount

    • createGiftDiscount

      public GiftDiscount createGiftDiscount(LocalDateTime startDate, LocalDateTime endDate, double spendingThreshold, StoreProduct gift, Category... categories)
      The gift discount's constructor with default id whose coverage is Category
      Parameters:
      startDate - the discount's start date
      endDate - the discount's end date
      spendingThreshold - the discount's spending threshold
      gift - the discount's gift
      categories - the desired categories
      Returns:
      the new CategoryGift discount

    • createQuantityDiscount

      public QuantityDiscount createQuantityDiscount(LocalDateTime startDate, LocalDateTime endDate, int numThreshold, double deduction, Category... categories)
      The quantity discount's constructor with default id whose coverage is Category
      Parameters:
      startDate - the discount's start date
      endDate - the discount's end date
      numThreshold - the discount's number of purchased products threshold
      deduction - the discount's deduction
      categories - the desired categories
      Returns:
      the new CategoryQuantity discount

    • createFixedPercentageDiscount

      public ProductFixedPercentage createFixedPercentageDiscount(LocalDateTime startDate, LocalDateTime endDate, double percentage, boolean overWholeStore, StoreProduct... products)
      The fixed percentage discount's constructor with default id whose coverage is Product
      Parameters:
      startDate - the discount's start date
      endDate - the discount's end date
      percentage - the discount's percentage
      overWholeStore - whether the discount is applied over all the store products or not
      products - the desired products
      Returns:
      the new ProductFixedPercentage discount

      public ProductGift createGiftDiscount(LocalDateTime startDate, LocalDateTime endDate, double spendingThreshold, StoreProduct gift, boolean overWholeStore, StoreProduct... products)

      Parameters:
      startDate - the discount's start date
      endDate - the discount's end date
      spendingThreshold - the discount's spending threshold
      gift - the discount's gift
      overWholeStore - whether the discount is applied over all the store products or not

      the new ProductGift discount

      public ProductQuantity createQuantityDiscount(LocalDateTime startDate, LocalDateTime endDate, int numThreshold, double deduction, boolean overWholeStore, StoreProduct... products)
      The quantity discount's constructor with default id whose coverage is Product
      Parameters:
      startDate - the discount's start date
      endDate - the discount's end date
      numThreshold - the discount's number of purchased targetProducts threshold
      deduction - the discount's deduction
      overWholeStore - whether the discount is applied over all the store products or not
      products - the desired products
